---
title: "DEG_CTC"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-15"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}
home<-setwd("/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/")
getwd()
```

## R Markdown

```{r libraries}
library(readxl)
library(WriteXLS)
library(writexl)
library(openxlsx)
library(reshape2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
#library(plyr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(Matrix)
library(edgeR)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(VennDiagram)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats) 
library(stringr)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(forcats)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r MSBB-data load}
# Read DEG values FP254
Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/FP_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/FP_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

CIBER <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/FP_Cibersort.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# Read DEG values IFG222
Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/IFG_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/IFG_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

CIBER <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/IFG_Cibersort.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# PHG 197 samples
Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/PHG_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/PHG_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

CIBER <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/PHG_Cibersort.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# STG226
Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/STG_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/STG_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

CIBER <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/STG_Cibersort.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# remove row with ENSG00000168255
Allgene <- Allgene %>% filter(target_id != "ENSG00000168255")
DTANGLE <- DTANGLE %>% filter(target_id != "ENSG00000168255")

```

```{r MSBB metadata}
# Read DEG values FP254
FP <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/metadata/metadata_PFC_FP.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
FP <-  subset(FP , select = c(2,43))

IFG <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/metadata/metadata_inferior_frontal_gyrus.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
IFG <-  subset(IFG , select = c(2,43))

PHG <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/metadata/metadata_parahippocampal_gyrus.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
PHG <-  subset(PHG , select = c(2,50))

STG <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/metadata/metadata_superior_temporal_gyrus.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
STG <-  subset(STG , select = c(2,43))

```

```{r Figure 2A: representing cell type proportions}
# Cell type proportion data
dtangleCTP <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/cell estimates/bulkcounts_superior_temporal_gyrus_Dtangle_estimates_celltype_estimates.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
colnames(dtangleCTP)[1]<- "specimenID"

# add pathology column from metadata
dtangleCTP <- inner_join(dtangleCTP, STG, by=c("specimenID"))

# Reshape the data from wide to long format for ggplot2
dtangleCTP_long <- melt(
  dtangleCTP, 
  id.vars = c("specimenID", "pathology"), 
  variable.name = "CellType", 
  value.name = "Proportion"
)

# box plot

# Rename pathology levels and reorder them
CTP_long <- dtangleCTP_long %>%
  mutate(pathology = recode(pathology, "NoAD" = "CTL")) %>%
  mutate(pathology = fct_relevel(pathology, "CTL", "AD"))  # Ensure CTL appears first

# Compute mean and standard error for each group
summary_data <- CTP_long %>%
  group_by(CellType, pathology) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_value = mean(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_value = sd(Proportion, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Plot with correctly positioned error bars, renamed labels, and reordered categories
boxplot <- ggplot(CTP_long, aes(x = CellType, y = Proportion, fill = pathology)) +     
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black", position = position_dodge(0.6)) +  # Dodge for clear separation
    geom_errorbar(data = summary_data, 
                  aes(x = CellType, y = mean_value, ymin = mean_value - se_value, ymax = mean_value + se_value, group = pathology),
                  width = 0.2, color = "black", position = position_dodge(0.6)) +  # Ensure error bars align with boxplots
    geom_point(data = summary_data, aes(x = CellType, y = mean_value, group = pathology), 
               color = "black", size = 2, shape = 21, fill = "white", position = position_dodge(0.6)) +  # Mean points
    labs(x = "", y = "Proportions")  +       
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
            "CTL" = "blue1",  
            "AD" = "chocolate2"
        )
    ) +       
    theme_minimal() +  
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),  # Removes gridlines
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 11),  
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),  
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),  
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
        legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size= 12),
        legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size= 12)
    )

# Display the plot
print(boxplot)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = boxplot,
       units = "in",
       height = 4,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/cell estimates/dtangle_CTPboxplot_STG.pdf")


```

```{r Figure 2A: calcualte the significance in difference btw cell proportions of CTL and AD}
# Rename file
CTP <- dtangleCTP

# Ensure pathology is a factor with correct reference order
CTP$pathology <- factor(CTP$pathology, levels = c("NoAD", "AD"))

# Function to calculate p-values and effect sizes for each cell type
calculate_p_values <- function(data, cell_types, group_col) {

  results <- lapply(cell_types, function(cell_type) {

    # Define groups explicitly: Control (NoAD) as reference
    group_ctl <- data[[cell_type]][data[[group_col]] == "NoAD"]
    group_ad  <- data[[cell_type]][data[[group_col]] == "AD"]

    # Two-sided Wilcoxon rank-sum test
    test_result <- wilcox.test(
      group_ctl,
      group_ad,
      alternative = "two.sided",
      exact = FALSE
    )

    # Rank-biserial correlation (effect size)
    n1 <- length(group_ctl)
    n2 <- length(group_ad)
    U  <- as.numeric(test_result$statistic)

    # Effect size:
    # Negative -> lower in AD
    # Positive -> higher in AD
    effect_size <- 1 - (2 * U) / (n1 * n2)

    data.frame(
      Cell_Type   = cell_type,
      P_Value     = test_result$p.value,
      Effect_Size = effect_size
    )
  })

  # Combine per-cell-type results
  results_df <- do.call(rbind, results)

  # Adjust p-values using Benjamini–Hochberg correction
  results_df$Adjusted_P <- p.adjust(results_df$P_Value, method = "BH")

  # Function to assign significance levels (based on adjusted p-values)
  get_significance <- function(p) {
    if (p <= 0.001) {
      "***"
    } else if (p <= 0.01) {
      "**"
    } else if (p <= 0.05) {
      "*"
    } else {
      "ns"
    }
  }

  # Apply significance function
  results_df$Significance <- sapply(results_df$Adjusted_P, get_significance)

  return(results_df)
}

# Define cell type columns
cell_types <- c("Neurons", "Astrocytes", "Oligodendrocytes", "Microglia")

# Calculate p-values and effect sizes
p_values_result <- calculate_p_values(CTP, cell_types, "pathology")

# Print results
print(p_values_result)

```

```{r Fig. S1A: compare cell type proportions- dtangle vs CIBERSORT}
dtangleCTP <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/cell estimates/bulkcounts_superior_temporal_gyrus_Dtangle_estimates_celltype_estimates.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
colnames(dtangleCTP)[1]<- "specimenID"

CiberCTP <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/cell estimates/bulkcounts_superior_temporal_gyrusCIBERSORT_estimates_celltype_estimates.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
colnames(CiberCTP)[1]<- "specimenID"

# add pathology column from metadata
dtangleCTP <- inner_join(dtangleCTP, STG, by=c("specimenID"))
CiberCTP <- inner_join(CiberCTP, STG, by=c("specimenID"))

# Melt the data into long format
dtangle_long <- melt(dtangleCTP, variable.name = "CellType", value.name = "Proportion")
dtangle_long$Dataset <- "dtangle"
Ciber_long <- melt(CiberCTP, variable.name = "CellType", value.name = "Proportion")
Ciber_long$Dataset <- "CIBERSORT"

# Combine the two datasets
# CIBER and Dtangle

merged_data <- merge(Ciber_long, dtangle_long, 
                     by = c("specimenID", "pathology","CellType"), 
                     suffixes = c("_Ciber", "_dtangle"))

# Rename pathology level
merged_data$pathology <- recode(merged_data$pathology,
                                "NoAD" = "CTL")

# Calculate correlation for each cell type
correlations <- merged_data %>%
  group_by(CellType,pathology) %>%
  do({
    cor_value <- cor(.$Proportion_dtangle, .$Proportion_Ciber, use = "complete.obs")
    data.frame(correlation = round(cor_value, 2))
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Print correlation for each cell type
print(correlations)


# Ensure correct order: CTL first, then AD
merged_data$pathology <- factor(merged_data$pathology,
                                levels = c("CTL", "AD"))

correlations$pathology <- factor(correlations$pathology,
                                 levels = c("CTL", "AD"))

# Plot scatter plots for each cell type with customization
scp <- ggplot(merged_data,
              aes(x = Proportion_Ciber,
                  y = Proportion_dtangle,
                  color = CellType)) +
    
    geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
    
    # Correlation labels (color-coded)
    geom_text(data = correlations,
              aes(x = 0.05,
                  y = 0.98 - as.numeric(factor(CellType)) * 0.07,
                  label = paste0("r = ", round(correlation, 2)),
                  color = CellType),
              inherit.aes = FALSE,
              hjust = 0,
              vjust = 1,
              show.legend = FALSE) +
    
    labs(x = "CIBERSORT Proportions",
         y = "dtangle Proportions",
         color = "Cell Type") +
    
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1),
                    ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
       "Neurons" = "Blue",
  "Astrocytes" = "Orange",
  "Oligodendrocytes" = "Purple"
    )) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, angle = 45),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    
    # Stack vertically
    facet_wrap(~ pathology)

print(scp)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = scp,
       units = "in",
       height = 4,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/cell estimates/STG_dtanglevsCiber_CTP.pdf")

```

```{r Figure 2B: Overlap with individual brain marker genes}
# Load the Marker files

Neuron <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/Overlap with Brain Markers/Neurons.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
Astro <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/Overlap with Brain Markers/Astrocytes.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
Micro <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/Overlap with Brain Markers/Microglia.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
Oligo <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/Overlap with Brain Markers/Oligodendrocytes.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

Allids <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/merged_gene_mapping.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# Matche for gene symbols
Markernew <- left_join(Oligo, Allids, by=c("ensembl_id"))

colnames(Markernew)[3] <- "HGNC_symbol"

# Overlap with DEGs
noCTC <- inner_join(Allgene, Markernew, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))
noCTC <- subset(noCTC , select = c(7,1,5))

dtangle <- inner_join(DTANGLE, Markernew, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))
dtangle <- subset(dtangle , select = c(7,1,5))

compare <-inner_join(noCTC, dtangle, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))

colnames(compare) <- c("HGNC_symbol","noCTC_LogFC", "noCTC_adjpval","CTCDT_LogFC","CTCDT_adjpval" )

# adpval
compare <- subset(compare , select = c(1,3,5))
colnames(compare) <- c("HGNC_symbol","noCTC","CTCDT")

# Convert data to long format
data_long <- melt(compare, id.vars = "HGNC_symbol")

# Perform hierarchical clustering on rows
row_dendrogram <- hclust(dist(compare[, -1]))  # Compute hierarchical clustering
row_order <- row_dendrogram$order  # Get the order of genes after clustering

# Reorder the Gene factor based on clustering
data_long$HGNC_symbol <- factor(data_long$HGNC_symbol, levels = compare$HGNC_symbol[row_order])

# Create heatmap with row clustering- adjpvalue
data_long <- data_long %>%
    mutate(fill_color = ifelse(value <= 0.05, "darkorange1", "cornsilk2"))

p1 <- ggplot(data_long, aes(x = variable, y = HGNC_symbol, fill = fill_color)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_identity() +  # Step 3: use exact colors as defined
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 1)) +  # Keep gene names visible
    labs(x = "", y = "Genes") +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(expand = FALSE) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("noCTC" = "noCTC", "CTCDT" = expression("CTC"^"DT"))) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, color = "gray", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, color = "black", linewidth = 0.2)

print(p1)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = p1,
       units = "in",
       height = 2,
       width = 2,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/Overlap with Brain Markers/STG_compareOligoMarkersFDR.pdf")

# LogFC
compare <-inner_join(noCTC, dtangle, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))

colnames(compare) <- c("HGNC_symbol","noCTC_LogFC", "noCTC_adjpval","CTCDT_LogFC","CTCDT_adjpval" )

compare <- subset(compare , select = c(1,2,4))
colnames(compare) <- c("HGNC_symbol","noCTC","CTCDT")

# Convert data to long format
data_long <- melt(compare, id.vars = "HGNC_symbol")

# Use the same row order
# Reorder the Gene factor based on clustering
data_long$HGNC_symbol <- factor(data_long$HGNC_symbol, levels = compare$HGNC_symbol[row_order])

# Create heatmap with row clustering- LogFC

p2 <- ggplot(data_long, aes(x = variable, y = HGNC_symbol, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 1)) +  # Keep gene names visible
  labs(x = "", y = "Genes") + theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian(expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("noCTC" = "noCTC", "CTCDT" = expression("CTC"^"DT"))) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, color = "gray", linewidth = 0.3)  

print(p2)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = p2,
       units = "in",
       height = 2,
       width = 3,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/Overlap with Brain Markers/STG_compareOligoMarkersLogFC.pdf")
```

```{r Fig. S2: common 134 MSBB set}
# FP134

Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/FP134_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/FP134_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# IFG134

Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/IFG134_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/IFG134_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# PHG134

Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/PHG134_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/PHG134_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# STG134

Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/STG134_all.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/Common134/STG134_dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

```

```{r Table 2: Find significant genes}
bulknoctc <- subset(Allgene, Allgene$adj_pval<=0.05)
ciber <- subset(CIBER, CIBER$adj_pval<=0.05)
dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE, DTANGLE$adj_pval<=0.05)

noCTC_ciber <- inner_join(bulknoctc, ciber, by= c("HGNC_symbol"))
noCTC_dtangle <- inner_join(bulknoctc, dtangle, by= c("HGNC_symbol"))
ciber_dtangle <- inner_join(ciber, dtangle, by= c("HGNC_symbol"))

write_xlsx(bulknoctc,"/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/noCTC.xlsx")
write_xlsx(dtangle,"/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/CTC.xlsx")

```

```{r Table S3: noCTCexcl vs CTCDTexcl stringent cutoff}
Allgene <- subset(Allgene , select = c(7,1,4,5))
DTANGLE <- subset(DTANGLE , select = c(7,1,4,5))

Joined <- inner_join(Allgene, DTANGLE, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))
colnames(Joined) <- c("HGNC_symbol","LogFC_noCTC","pval_noCTC","adjp_noCTC","LogFC_CTC","pval_CTC","adjp_CTC")

noCTCexcl <- subset(Joined, Joined$adjp_noCTC<=0.05 & Joined$pval_CTC>0.1)
CTCDTexcl <- subset(Joined, Joined$adjp_CTC<=0.05 & Joined$pval_noCTC>0.1)

write_xlsx(noCTCexcl,"/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/noCTCexcl.xlsx")
write_xlsx(CTCDTexcl,"/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/CTCDTexcl.xlsx")
```

```{r Flipped genes without cutoff}
Bulk <-  subset(Allgene , select = c(7,1))
Dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE , select = c(7,1))

# Merge the data frames by gene_name for all genes
merged_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "HGNC_symbol"), 
                      list(Dtangle,Bulk))

# Rename columns for clarity for allgene data
colnames(merged_data) <- c("HGNC_symbol", "LogFC_dtangle", "LogFC_noCTC")

# Genes whose LogFC flipped after correction
flipped <- merged_data$HGNC_symbol[
  sign(merged_data$LogFC_dtangle) != sign(merged_data$LogFC_noCTC)
]
# Number of flipped genes

length(flipped)

flipped <- as.data.frame(flipped)
colnames(flipped)[1] <- "HGNC_symbol"

write_xlsx(flipped,"/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/flipped.xlsx")
```

```{r Figure 3 & Fig. S1B: scatter plot for method comparison using all genes}
# Filter all genes and corresponding logFC from 3 files

Bulk <-  subset(Allgene , select = c(7,1))
Ciber <- subset(CIBER , select = c(7,1))
Dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE , select = c(7,1))

# Merge the data frames by gene_name for all genes
merged_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "HGNC_symbol"), 
                      list(Ciber, Dtangle,Bulk))

# Rename columns for clarity for allgene data
colnames(merged_data) <- c("gene_name", "LogFC_Ciber", "LogFC_dtangle", "LogFC_noCTC")


# Step 3: Create scatter plots to compare ranks between datasets

# Bulk vs. CIBERSORT
plot1 <- ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = LogFC_noCTC, y = LogFC_Ciber)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = expression("noCTC vs CTC"^"CS"),
    x = "LogFC in noCTC",
    y = expression("LogFC in CTC"^"CS")) +
  theme_minimal() +  
    theme(
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, angle = 0),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black",  size = 14)
    )

print(plot1)

# Bulk vs. DTANGLE
plot2 <- ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = LogFC_noCTC, y = LogFC_dtangle)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "green") +
  labs(x = "LogFC in noCTC",
       y = expression("LogFC in CTC"^"DT")) +
  theme_minimal() +  
    theme(
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black",  size = 14)
    )

print(plot2)

# CIBERSORT vs. DTANGLE
plot3 <- ggplot(merged_data, aes(x = LogFC_Ciber, y = LogFC_dtangle)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "red") +
  labs( x = expression("LogFC in CTC"^"CS"),
        y = expression("LogFC in CTC"^"DT")) +
  theme_minimal() +  
    theme(
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black",  size = 14)
    )

print(plot3)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = plot3,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/PHG_CTCCSvsCTCDT.pdf")


```

```{r Fig. S4: concordance scatter plot with bar plot for flip type Insert}
# Extract column- gene name and LogFC value
Bulk <-  subset(Allgene , select = c(7,1))
Dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE , select = c(7,1))

# Merge the data frames by gene_name for all genes
merged_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "HGNC_symbol"), 
                      list(Dtangle,Bulk))

# Rename columns for clarity for allgene data
colnames(merged_data) <- c("gene_name", "LogFC_dtangle", "LogFC_noCTC")

# Select LogFC columns
cor_matrix <- cor(merged_data[, c("LogFC_dtangle", "LogFC_noCTC")],
                  method = "pearson")

# Classify flip types
df <- merged_data %>%
  mutate(flip_type = case_when(
    LogFC_noCTC > 0 & LogFC_dtangle < 0 ~ "Up to Down",
    LogFC_noCTC < 0 & LogFC_dtangle > 0 ~ "Down to Up",
    TRUE ~ "Concordant"
  ))

# Count flipped types
flip_counts <- df %>%
  filter(flip_type != "Concordant") %>%
  count(flip_type)

# Main concordance plot
p_main <- ggplot(df, aes(x = LogFC_noCTC, y = LogFC_dtangle, color = flip_type)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up to Down" = "red", "Down to Up" = "blue", "Concordant" = "lemonchiffon4")) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_abline(slope = -1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
    labs(x = expression("LogFC in noCTC"),
         y = expression("LogFC in CTC"^"DT"),
         color = "Flip Type") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        legend.position = "none",  # Adjust legend position inside plot
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5), 
        legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size= 14),
        legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size= 14)
    )

# Bar plot of flipped counts
p_bar <- ggplot(flip_counts, aes(x = flip_type, y = n, fill = flip_type)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up to Down" = "red", "Down to Up" = "blue")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
    theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5), 
        legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size= 10),
        legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size= 10)
    )

# Combine with inset
final_plot <- ggdraw() +
    draw_plot(p_main) +
    draw_plot(p_bar, x = 0.65, y = 0.2, width = 0.3, height = 0.3) 

# Display
print(final_plot)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = final_plot,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/STG_flipplot.pdf")
```

```{r Density Plot: Compare Distribution of LogFC}
Bulk <-  subset(Allgene , select = c(7,1))
Dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE , select = c(7,1))

# Merge the data frames by gene_name for all genes
merged_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "HGNC_symbol"), 
                      list(Dtangle,Bulk))

# Rename columns for clarity for allgene data
colnames(merged_data) <- c("gene_name", "LogFC_dtangle", "LogFC_noCTC")

# Reshape data for ggplot
df_long <- reshape2::melt(merged_data,
                          id.vars = "gene_name",
                          measure.vars = c("LogFC_dtangle", "LogFC_noCTC"),
                          variable.name = "Correction",
                          value.name = "LogFC")

# Density plot
plotd <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = LogFC, fill = Correction)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.5) + coord_cartesian(xlim = range(df_long$LogFC)) +
    labs(
        x = "Log2 Fold Change",
        y = "Density"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("darkorange", "steelblue"),
        labels = c( expression(CTC^DT),"noCTC"),
        name = NULL  # Remove legend title
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, angle = 0),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black",  size = 14)
    )

print(plotd)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = plotd,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/PHG_densityplot.pdf")

```

```{r Fig. S5, S9: Venn Diagram- Overlap and significance}
# noCTC vs CTCDT
bulknoctc <- subset(Allgene, Allgene$adj_pval<=0.05)
dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE, DTANGLE$adj_pval<=0.05)

# Extract gene names from each tab
genes_dtangle <- dtangle$HGNC_symbol
genes_bulknoctc <- bulknoctc$HGNC_symbol


# Combine all genes from the three lists and find unique entries
all_genes <- unique(c( genes_dtangle, genes_bulknoctc))


# Bulk and dtangle
venn <- venn.diagram(
    x = list(
        CTCDT = genes_dtangle,
        noCTC = genes_bulknoctc
    ),
    category.names = c(expression("CTC"^"DT"), "noCTC"),
    filename = NULL,  # Save plot in memory instead of a file
    fill = c("darkorange", "steelblue"),
    alpha = 0.5,
    cex = 2.5, cat.cex = 2.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    cat.fontface = "bold",
    main = ""
)

# Save the Venn diagram
png("/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/FP2.png", width = 400, height = 400)
grid.draw(venn)
dev.off()

# Overlap and significance

# Calculate the total number of unique genes
total_genes_in_universe <- 15179 # MSBB 

# Function to calculate overlap significance
calculate_hypergeo_pval <- function(list1, list2, universe_size) {
  overlap <- length(intersect(list1, list2))  # Number of overlapping genes
  size_list1 <- length(list1)  # Size of list1
  size_list2 <- length(list2)  # Size of list2
  
  # Hypergeometric test
  p_value <- phyper(overlap - 1, size_list1, universe_size - size_list1, size_list2, lower.tail = FALSE)
  
  return(list(overlap = overlap, p_value = p_value))
}

# Calculate overlaps and p-values for each pair
result_ciber_dtangle <- calculate_hypergeo_pval(genes_ciber, genes_dtangle, total_genes_in_universe)
result_ciber_noCTC <- calculate_hypergeo_pval(genes_ciber, genes_bulknoctc, total_genes_in_universe)
result_dtangle_noCTC <- calculate_hypergeo_pval(genes_dtangle, genes_bulknoctc, total_genes_in_universe)

# Print results
cat("Total unique genes in the universe:", total_genes_in_universe, "\n")
cat("Overlap and significance:\n")
cat("CIBER vs dtangle: Overlap =", result_ciber_dtangle$overlap, 
    ", P-value =", result_ciber_dtangle$p_value, "\n")
cat("CIBER vs noCTC: Overlap =", result_ciber_noCTC$overlap, 
    ", P-value =", result_ciber_noCTC$p_value, "\n")
cat("dtangle vs noCTC: Overlap =", result_dtangle_noCTC$overlap, 
    ", P-value =", result_dtangle_noCTC$p_value, "\n")


```

```{r Fig. S1C: Bland-Altman Plot}
# Filter all genes and corresponding LogFC from 3 files
Ciber <- subset(CIBER , select = c(7,1))
Dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE , select = c(7,1))

# Merge the data frames by gene_name for all genes
merged_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "HGNC_symbol"), list(Ciber, Dtangle))

colnames(merged_data) <- c("gene_name", "LogFC_Ciber", "LogFC_dtangle")

# Calculate Bland-Altman statistics
bland_altman_data <- merged_data %>%
  mutate(
    mean_diff = (LogFC_Ciber + LogFC_dtangle) / 2, # Mean of methods
    diff = LogFC_Ciber - LogFC_dtangle,            # Difference
    sd_diff = sd(diff)                                       # Standard deviation of differences
  )

# Compute the mean difference (bias) and confidence interval
mean_bias <- mean(bland_altman_data$diff)
ci_bias <- t.test(bland_altman_data$diff)$conf.int  # Confidence interval

# Bland-Altman Plot
baplot <- ggplot(bland_altman_data, aes(x = mean_diff, y = diff)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +  # Scatter plot points
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean_bias, linetype = "solid", color = "red", linewidth = 1.2) +  # Mean bias line
  geom_hline(yintercept = ci_bias[1], linetype = "dotted", color = "gray", linewidth = 1) +  # Lower CI
  geom_hline(yintercept = ci_bias[2], linetype = "dotted", color = "gray", linewidth = 1) +  # Upper CI
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "blue", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +  # Loess regression
  labs( x = bquote("Mean"),
        y = bquote("Difference")
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),  # Remove gridlines
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 12)
  )

# Print plot
print(baplot)

# save the plot
ggsave(plot = baplot,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/STG_Bland-Altman.pdf")
```

```{r Figure 4: region-wise DEG consistency before and after deconvolution- Jaccard}
# reassign names
BM10_pre <- Allgene
BM10_post <- DTANGLE
BM44_pre <- Allgene
BM44_post <- DTANGLE
BM36_pre <- Allgene
BM36_post <- DTANGLE
BM22_pre <- Allgene
BM22_post <- DTANGLE

# Define Function to Extract DEG Genes
get_deg_genes <- function(deg_table, fdr_thresh = 0.05) {
  deg_table <- deg_table[!is.na(deg_table$adj_pval), ]
  deg_table$HGNC_symbol[deg_table$adj_pval < fdr_thresh]
}

# Create DEG Lists by Region
deg_list_pre <- list(
  FP = get_deg_genes(BM10_pre),
  IFG = get_deg_genes(BM44_pre),
  PHG = get_deg_genes(BM36_pre),
  STG = get_deg_genes(BM22_pre)
)

deg_list_post <- list(
  FP = get_deg_genes(BM10_post),
  IFG = get_deg_genes(BM44_post),
  PHG = get_deg_genes(BM36_post),
  STG = get_deg_genes(BM22_post)
)

# Compute Jaccard & Overlap Coefficient

compute_overlap_metrics <- function(deg_list) {
  regions <- names(deg_list)
  n <- length(regions)
  jaccard <- overlap <- matrix(NA, nrow = n, ncol = n,
                               dimnames = list(regions, regions))
  
  for (i in seq_along(regions)) {
    for (j in seq_along(regions)) {
      g1 <- deg_list[[i]]
      g2 <- deg_list[[j]]
      inter <- length(intersect(g1, g2))
      union <- length(union(g1, g2))
      min_set <- min(length(g1), length(g2))
      
      jaccard[i, j] <- inter / union
      overlap[i, j] <- inter / min_set
    }
  }
  list(Jaccard = jaccard, Overlap = overlap)
}

metrics_pre <- compute_overlap_metrics(deg_list_pre)
metrics_post <- compute_overlap_metrics(deg_list_post)


# Plot JSI heatmaps

# Split heatmap
# Combine pre and post Jaccard matrices into one
combined_jaccard <- matrix(NA, nrow = 4, ncol = 4)
rownames(combined_jaccard) <- colnames(combined_jaccard) <- names(deg_list_pre)

for (i in 1:4) {
    for (j in 1:4) {
        if (i > j) {
            combined_jaccard[i, j] <- metrics_pre$Jaccard[i, j]  # Lower triangle: pre-correction
        } else if (i < j) {
            combined_jaccard[i, j] <- metrics_post$Jaccard[i, j] # Upper triangle: post-correction
        } else {
            combined_jaccard[i, j] <- 1  # Optionally leave diagonal blank
        }
    }
}

# Custom color gradient
split_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("white", "lightgreen", "forestgreen"))(100)

# Plot the split matrix
pdf("Split_Jaccard_Heatmap.pdf", width = 5, height = 4)
pheatmap(
    combined_jaccard,
    main = "Split Jaccard Index\nLower: Pre-Correction | Upper: Post-Correction",
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    color = split_colors,
    legend = TRUE,
    display_numbers = TRUE,
    fontsize_number = 12,
    number_color = "black",
    angle_col = 0
)
dev.off()

# Individual JSI heatmap
# Define a custom color palette
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("white", "skyblue", "blue", "darkblue"))(100)

# Save Jaccard Index (Pre-Correction)
pdf("Jaccard_PreCorrection_FDR05.pdf", width = 7, height = 6)
pheatmap(
  metrics_pre$Jaccard,
  main = "Jaccard Index (Pre-Correction)",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  color = my_colors,
  legend = TRUE,  # optional, legend is shown by default
  display_numbers = TRUE , # optional: show values inside cells
  fontsize_number = 12 )
dev.off()

# Save Jaccard Index (Post-Correction)
pdf("Jaccard_PostCorrection_FDR20.pdf", width = 7, height = 6)
pheatmap(
  metrics_post$Jaccard,
  main = "Jaccard Index (Post-Correction)",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  color = my_colors,
  legend = TRUE,  # optional, legend is shown by default
  display_numbers = TRUE, # optional: show values inside cells
  fontsize_number = 12  
)
dev.off()
```

```{r Overlap with GWAS}
#GWAS catalogue
ADGWAS <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/AD_risk_genes_protein_coding.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
colnames(ADGWAS) <- "HGNC_symbol" 

# Significant DEGs
bulknoctc <- subset(Allgene, Allgene$adj_pval<=0.05)
dtangle <- subset(DTANGLE, DTANGLE$adj_pval<=0.05)


# Overlap with GWAS
siggenes_GWAS <- inner_join(bulknoctc, ADGWAS, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))
(length(siggenes_GWAS$HGNC_symbol)/length(bulknoctc$HGNC_symbol))*100

siggenes_GWAS <- inner_join(dtangle, ADGWAS, by=c("HGNC_symbol"))
(length(siggenes_GWAS$HGNC_symbol)/length(dtangle$HGNC_symbol))*100
```

```{r Table S6: AD risk loci from Open Targets}
# File paths
input_file  <- "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/GWAS_OpenTargets/OpenTarget_AD.tsv"
output_file <- "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/AD_GWAS_genes_OpenTargets.tsv"

# Read Open Targets file
ot <- read.delim(input_file, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Convert 'No data' to NA and coerce to numeric
ot <- ot %>%
  mutate(
    gwasCredibleSets = as.numeric(
      ifelse(gwasCredibleSets == "No data", NA, gwasCredibleSets)
    )
  )

# Sanity check (optional)
summary(ot$gwasCredibleSets)

# Extract AD GWAS risk genes 
ad_gwas_genes <- ot %>%
  filter(!is.na(gwasCredibleSets), gwasCredibleSets >= 0.2) %>%
  select(symbol, gwasCredibleSets) %>%
  arrange(desc(gwasCredibleSets)) %>%
  distinct()

# Inspect top genes
head(ad_gwas_genes, 10)

# Write output
write.table(
  ad_gwas_genes,
  file = output_file,
  sep = "\t",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)




```

```{r Process AD risk file}
ADrisk <- read_xlsx("/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/AD_GWAS_genes_OpenTargets.xlsx", sheet = 1)

# Merge Function
merge_ADrisk_DE <- function(ADrisk, DEdf, prefix) {
  DEdf %>%
    select(HGNC_symbol, logFC, PValue) %>%   # keep only relevant columns
    inner_join(ADrisk %>% select(HGNC_symbol), by = "HGNC_symbol") %>%  # merge by gene symbol
    rename(
      !!paste0(prefix, "_logFC") := logFC,
      !!paste0(prefix, "_PValue") := PValue
    )
}

# Merge ADrisk with DE datasets

ADrisk_pval_FPnoCTC <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, Allgene, "FPnoCTC")
ADrisk_pval_FPCTC   <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, DTANGLE, "FPCTC")

ADrisk_pval_IFGnoCTC <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, Allgene, "IFGnoCTC")
ADrisk_pval_IFGCTC   <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, DTANGLE, "IFGCTC")

ADrisk_pval_PHGnoCTC <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, Allgene, "PHGnoCTC")
ADrisk_pval_PHGCTC   <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, DTANGLE, "PHGCTC")

ADrisk_pval_STGnoCTC <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, Allgene, "STGnoCTC")
ADrisk_pval_STGCTC   <- merge_ADrisk_DE(ADrisk, DTANGLE, "STGCTC")

# function: calculate adjusted p-values (FDR)

adjust_pval <- function(df, pcol, new_col) {
  df %>% mutate(!!new_col := p.adjust(.data[[pcol]], method = "BH"))
}

# Calculate adjusted p-values

ADrisk_pval_FPnoCTC <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_FPnoCTC, "FPnoCTC_PValue", "FPnoCTC_adjP")
ADrisk_pval_FPCTC   <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_FPCTC, "FPCTC_PValue", "FPCTC_adjP")

ADrisk_pval_IFGnoCTC <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_IFGnoCTC, "IFGnoCTC_PValue", "IFGnoCTC_adjP")
ADrisk_pval_IFGCTC   <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_IFGCTC,   "IFGCTC_PValue",   "IFGCTC_adjP")

ADrisk_pval_PHGnoCTC <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_PHGnoCTC, "PHGnoCTC_PValue", "PHGnoCTC_adjP")
ADrisk_pval_PHGCTC   <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_PHGCTC,   "PHGCTC_PValue",   "PHGCTC_adjP")

ADrisk_pval_STGnoCTC <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_STGnoCTC, "STGnoCTC_PValue", "STGnoCTC_adjP")
ADrisk_pval_STGCTC   <- adjust_pval(ADrisk_pval_STGCTC,   "STGCTC_PValue",   "STGCTC_adjP")

# Merge multiple DE datasets into one table

ADrisk_STG <- full_join(
  ADrisk_pval_STGnoCTC,
  ADrisk_pval_STGCTC,
  by = "HGNC_symbol"
)

write_xlsx(ADrisk_PHG,"/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBB/MSBB_newcovariates/ADrisk_STG.xlsx")

# Filter significant genes (adjP <= 0.05) for each dataset

sig_genes_FPnoCTC <- ADrisk_pval_FPnoCTC %>% filter(FPnoCTC_adjP <= 0.05)
sig_genes_FPCTC   <- ADrisk_pval_FPCTC   %>% filter(FPCTC_adjP   <= 0.05)

sig_genes_IFGnoCTC <- ADrisk_pval_IFGnoCTC %>% filter(IFGnoCTC_adjP <= 0.05)
sig_genes_IFGCTC   <- ADrisk_pval_IFGCTC   %>% filter(IFGCTC_adjP   <= 0.05)

sig_genes_PHGnoCTC <- ADrisk_pval_PHGnoCTC %>% filter(PHGnoCTC_adjP <= 0.05)
sig_genes_PHGCTC   <- ADrisk_pval_PHGCTC   %>% filter(PHGCTC_adjP   <= 0.05)

sig_genes_STGnoCTC <- ADrisk_pval_STGnoCTC %>% filter(STGnoCTC_adjP <= 0.05)
sig_genes_STGCTC   <- ADrisk_pval_STGCTC   %>% filter(STGCTC_adjP   <= 0.05)

# -----------------------------
# Count number of significant genes for each dataset
# -----------------------------
num_sig_FPnoCTC <- nrow(sig_genes_FPnoCTC)
num_sig_FPCTC   <- nrow(sig_genes_FPCTC)

num_sig_IFGnoCTC <- nrow(sig_genes_IFGnoCTC)
num_sig_IFGCTC   <- nrow(sig_genes_IFGCTC)

num_sig_PHGnoCTC <- nrow(sig_genes_PHGnoCTC)
num_sig_PHGCTC   <- nrow(sig_genes_PHGCTC)

num_sig_STGnoCTC <- nrow(sig_genes_STGnoCTC)
num_sig_STGCTC   <- nrow(sig_genes_STGCTC)

# -----------------------------
# Create summary table
# -----------------------------
sig_counts <- tibble(
  Dataset = c("FPnoCTC", "FPCTC", 
              "IFGnoCTC", "IFGCTC", 
              "PHGnoCTC", "PHGCTC", 
              "STGnoCTC", "STGCTC"),
  Num_Significant = c(num_sig_FPnoCTC, num_sig_FPCTC,
                      num_sig_IFGnoCTC, num_sig_IFGCTC,
                      num_sig_PHGnoCTC, num_sig_PHGCTC,
                      num_sig_STGnoCTC, num_sig_STGCTC)
)

# Print the summary
print(sig_counts)

# Find common significant genes
common_sig <- inner_join(
  sig_genes_STGnoCTC,
  sig_genes_STGCTC,
  by = "HGNC_symbol"
)

# Print the table
print(common_sig)

# Optional: number of common genes
nrow(common_sig)

# Plot the counts

# Add Region column
sig_counts <- sig_counts %>%
  mutate(Region = case_when(
    grepl("FP", Dataset) ~ "FP",
    grepl("IFG", Dataset) ~ "IFG",
    grepl("PHG", Dataset) ~ "PHG",
    grepl("STG", Dataset) ~ "STG"
  ))

# Horizontal bar plot with outer border and no gridlines
 p <- ggplot(sig_counts, aes(x = Num_Significant, y = Dataset, fill = Region)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Significant Genes per Dataset",
       x = "Num Significant",
       y = "Dataset") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FP" = "#1f77b4",   # blue
                               "IFG" = "#ff7f0e", # orange
                               "PHG" = "#2ca02c", # green
                               "STG" = "#d62728"  # red
                               )) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),   # remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),   # remove minor gridlines
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1) # outer border
  )

 print(p)
 
 # save the plot
ggsave(plot = p,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/ADrisk_brainregions.pdf")

```

```{r ROSMAP Bulk631 data load}
# Read DEG values
Allgene <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/ROSMAPBulk631/DEGs_bulk631_countmatrix_20250722.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

DTANGLE <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/ROSMAPBulk631/DEGs_bulk631_countmatrix_CTC_20250722_Dtangle.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")

CIBER <- read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/ROSMAPBulk631/DEGs_bulk631_countmatrix_CTC_20250722_CIBERSORT.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")
```

```{r Figure 5A: ROSMAP vs MSBB}
common <- read_xlsx("/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/commongeneMSBB_ROSMAP.xlsx", sheet = 2)

MSBB <- Allgene
ROSMAP <- Allgene

MSBB <- DTANGLE
ROSMAP <- DTANGLE

common <- inner_join(MSBB, ROSMAP, by= c("HGNC_symbol"))

FP <- subset(common, common$adj_pval.x<=0.05 )
DLPFC <- subset(common, common$adj_pval.y<=0.05 )
common1 <- inner_join(FP, DLPFC, by= c("HGNC_symbol"))
FPexcl <- subset(common, common$adj_pval.x<=0.05 & common$PValue.y>0.1)
DLPFCexcl <- subset(common, common$adj_pval.y<=0.05 & common$PValue.x>0.1)
common2 <- inner_join(FPexcl, DLPFCexcl, by= c("HGNC_symbol"))


# Plot venn diagram
genes_ROSMAP <- DLPFC$HGNC_symbol
genes_MSBB <- FP$HGNC_symbol

ROSMS <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(ROSMAP = genes_ROSMAP, MSBB = genes_MSBB),
  category.names = c("DLPFC", "FP"),
  filename = NULL, # To plot in the R console
  output = TRUE,
  fill = c( "steelblue","lightpink"),
  alpha = 0.5,
  cex = 2.5,
  cat.cex = 2
)


# save the plot
ggsave(plot = ROSMS,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/ROSMAP_MSBB_CTCdtFDR5.pdf")

# overlap significance
compute_enrichment <- function(universe, subset1, subset2, overlap) {
  # hypergeometric p-value (>= overlap)
  p_hyper <- phyper(overlap - 1, subset1, universe - subset1, subset2, lower.tail = FALSE)
  
  # contingency table
  a <- overlap
  b <- subset1 - overlap
  c <- subset2 - overlap
  d <- universe - (a + b + c)
  mat <- matrix(c(a, b, c, d), nrow = 2,
                dimnames = list(subset1 = c("yes", "no"),
                                subset2 = c("yes", "no")))
  fisher_res <- fisher.test(mat, alternative = "greater")
  
  expected <- subset1 * subset2 / universe
  fold_enrich <- overlap / expected
  
  list(
    expected_overlap = expected,
    fold_enrichment = fold_enrich,
    odds_ratio = fisher_res$estimate,
    p_value = fisher_res$p.value,
    hyper_p_value = p_hyper
  )
}

# First scenario
res1 <- compute_enrichment(15131, 1234, 4222, 752)

# Second scenario
res2 <- compute_enrichment(15131, 191, 1572, 81)

print(res1)
print(res2)

# Jaccard similarity index

# reassign names
FP_pre <- Allgene
FP_post <- DTANGLE
DLPFC_pre <- Allgene
DLPFC_post <- DTANGLE


# Define Function to Extract DEG Genes
get_deg_genes <- function(deg_table, fdr_thresh = 0.05) {
  deg_table <- deg_table[!is.na(deg_table$adj_pval), ]
  deg_table$HGNC_symbol[deg_table$adj_pval < fdr_thresh]
}

# Create DEG Lists by Region
deg_list_pre <- list(
  FP = get_deg_genes(FP_pre),
  DLPFC = get_deg_genes(DLPFC_pre)
)

deg_list_post <- list(
  FP = get_deg_genes(FP_post),
  DLPFC = get_deg_genes(DLPFC_post)
)

# Compute Jaccard & Overlap Coefficient

compute_overlap_metrics <- function(deg_list) {
  regions <- names(deg_list)
  n <- length(regions)
  jaccard <- overlap <- matrix(NA, nrow = n, ncol = n,
                               dimnames = list(regions, regions))
  
  for (i in seq_along(regions)) {
    for (j in seq_along(regions)) {
      g1 <- deg_list[[i]]
      g2 <- deg_list[[j]]
      inter <- length(intersect(g1, g2))
      union <- length(union(g1, g2))
      min_set <- min(length(g1), length(g2))
      
      jaccard[i, j] <- inter / union
      overlap[i, j] <- inter / min_set
    }
  }
  list(Jaccard = jaccard, Overlap = overlap)
}

metrics_pre <- compute_overlap_metrics(deg_list_pre)
metrics_post <- compute_overlap_metrics(deg_list_post)


# Plot heatmaps
# Define a custom color palette
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("white", "skyblue", "cornflowerblue", "dodgerblue"))(100)

# Save Jaccard Index (Pre-Correction)
pdf("Jaccard_PreCorrection_ROSMSBB.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)
pheatmap(
  metrics_pre$Jaccard,
  main = "Jaccard Index (Pre-Correction)",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  color = my_colors,
  legend = TRUE,  # optional, legend is shown by default
  display_numbers = TRUE , # optional: show values inside cells
  fontsize_number = 12 )
dev.off()

# Save Jaccard Index (Post-Correction)
pdf("Jaccard_PostCorrection_ROSMSBB.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)
pheatmap(
  metrics_post$Jaccard,
  main = "Jaccard Index (Post-Correction)",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  color = my_colors,
  legend = TRUE,  # optional, legend is shown by default
  display_numbers = TRUE, # optional: show values inside cells
  fontsize_number = 12  
)
dev.off()
```

```{r Figure 5B: ROSMAP vs MSBB severity score}
meta <-read.csv('/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/rosmap_msbbFP_combinedmetadata.csv', header = TRUE, sep = ",")


meta <- subset(meta , select = c(8,9,5,6))
meta_long <- melt(meta, variable.name = "severity", value.name = "Score")

meta_long <- meta_long %>%
  mutate(pathology = recode(pathology, "NoAD" = "CTL")) %>%
  mutate(pathology = fct_relevel(pathology, "CTL", "AD"))  # Ensure CTL appears

# Plot
box_plot <- ggplot(meta_long, aes(x = pathology, y = Score, fill = Dataset)) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.8) +
    labs(x = "",
         y = "Severity")+ facet_wrap(~severity) +theme_minimal()+  # Use a minimal theme
    theme( axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),  # Customize y-axis text
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),  # Make axis titles bold
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),panel.grid = element_blank()
    ) +  
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
        "FP" = "lightpink",
        "DLPFC" = "steelblue"
    ) )

print(box_plot)


# save the plot
ggsave(plot = box_plot,
       units = "in",
       height = 5,
       width = 6,
       filename = "/Users/sanga/Desktop/IIT Madras/DEG_CTC/MSBBvsROSMAPseverity.pdf")
```
